who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We simplify the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of vendor invoices with purchase orders
